name: asset-factory-blueprint-agent-workflow
description: Internal skill workflow for asset creation from source intake through the seven-stage pipeline to validation and governance.

stages.name: Run planning and skill routing
stages.instruction: Execute run planning and skill routing with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Asset programme intake
stages.instruction: Execute asset programme intake with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Source asset ingestion
stages.instruction: Execute source asset ingestion with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Mesh reconstruction from images and descriptions
stages.instruction: Execute mesh reconstruction from images and descriptions with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Segmentation and semantic inference
stages.instruction: Execute segmentation and semantic inference with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Material and physical inference
stages.instruction: Execute material and physical inference with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Texturing, texture generation and decals
stages.instruction: Execute texturing, texture generation and decals with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Physics, articulation and grasp affordances
stages.instruction: Execute physics, articulation and grasp affordance authoring with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: Nonvisual material inference
stages.instruction: Execute nonvisual material inference with manifests, evidence and validation gates.

stages.name: SimReady packaging and USD verification
stages.instruction: Execute simready packaging and USD verification with manifests, evidence and validation gates.
